Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class FileEventStore

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.FileEventStore
public class FileEventStore extends SObject

Java class for FileEventStore complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="FileEventStore">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CanDownloadPdf" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentSize" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Document" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ContentDocument" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DocumentId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EvaluationTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FileAction" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FileName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FileSource" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FileType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsLatestVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LoginKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Policy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}TransactionSecurityPolicy" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PolicyId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PolicyOutcome" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessDuration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelatedEventIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SessionKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SessionLevel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SourceIp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="User" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Username" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Version" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ContentVersion" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="VersionId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="VersionNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
